title: Intellia Therapeutics Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Business Updates
text: Intellia Therapeutics announced first quarter 2026 financial results and business updates. The company reported revenue of $15.0 million, beating forecasts by 9.0%, and losses of $0.81 per share, 9.0% smaller than anticipated. Q1 2026 net loss narrowed to $96.2M from $114.3M year over year. The company achieved a historic milestone by presenting the world's first Phase 3 data for an in vivo gene editing candidate and initiated a rolling BLA submission. The company also recently resumed patient screening for both Phase 3 clinical trials in ATTR and strengthened its balance sheet with an underwritten public offering. Cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities were $517.2M on March 31, 2026, plus approximately $207M from an April equity offering, funding operations at least into 2028.
